questions.prompt: Because Cathy is short, the teacher let her sit in the first ____.
questions.explain: 教室裡的第一「排」要用 row。course 是課程；item 是項目；sign 是標誌。

questions.prompt: ____ it rains tomorrow, we will stay at home.
questions.explain: 這是條件句，「如果明天下雨」。注意 if 子句裡用 rains，不是 will rain。
未來式被動語態是 will be + p.p.，所以要選 be built。

questions.prompt: My brother is in the ninth ____, so he will graduate from junior high this year.
questions.explain: ninth grade 是九年級，所以選 grade。這裡考的是 grade 的「年級」意思。

questions.prompt: Leo was tired after the game, and I was, ____.
questions.explain: 句尾肯定附和用 too，所以是 I was, too. so 若放句首就要倒裝。

questions.prompt: Linda got a perfect ____ on her English test, so she was very happy.
questions.explain: 考試拿滿分，是得到很好的「成績」，所以選 grade。這題考 grade 的另一個意思。

questions.prompt: Neither my mom nor my sisters ____ at home now.
questions.explain: 靠近動詞的是 my sisters，複數，所以用 are。

questions.prompt: I was taking a shower ____ the phone rang.
questions.explain: 電話突然響是短動作，所以用 when。不能只看前面有 was taking 就選 while。

questions.prompt: Andy got up late and ____ the school bus this morning.
questions.explain: 晚起導致「錯過」校車，missed 最自然。

questions.prompt: Mr. Lin is both kind ____ patient.
